page.title: Consent grants
page.description: OAuth refresh-token grants a user has consented to per application. Revoking a grant invalidates the whole refresh-token rotation chain for that (app, user) pair.

list.title: Active grants
list.emptyDescription: Grants appear here once users authorize an OAuth / OIDC application.

revoke.title: Revoke this grant?
revoke.descriptionNamed: This immediately invalidates the refresh-token chain for {{email}} on this application. They’ll be prompted to re-consent on next sign-in.
revoke.descriptionFallback: This invalidates the refresh-token chain for this grant.
